# components

**Instance Property**

The payload’s components.

## Declaration

```swift
var components: [OSLogMessageComponent] { get }
```

## Discussion

This property contains an array of [doc://com.apple.oslog/documentation/OSLog/OSLogMessageComponent] objects from the composed message.

## Elements of a Payload

- **category**: The payload’s category.
- **formatString**: The payload’s format string.
- **subsystem**: The payload’s subsystem.
